caption:
Japanese Bakery & Café to Visit in London 🇯🇵✨

Just a short walk from Waterloo Station, Tokyo Bagel offers homemade bagels, sandwiches, delicious pastries, brunch favourites, and dreamy desserts🥯🍰🍓

Highlights include:�🥐Oni-Croissant, buttery, flaky layers filled with rich chocolate or smooth hazelnut cream�🐰Coconut Jelly Bunny, a light, sweet dessert you simply can’t miss�🍓Strawberry & Cream Shokupan French Toast, a delicious brunch option served with fresh berries, cream, and strawberry sauce
☕For drinks, don’t miss the signature Matcha Tiramisu Latte and Ube Latte

Open daily:
🕥9:00-16:30 Bakery and Cafe 
🕣16:30-22:00 Japanese Cocktail Bar
�📍Tokyo Bagel, Unit B, 101 Lower Marsh, London SE1 7AB @tokyobagellondon
